title: Thermal Jetpacks
description: An addon mod for the thermal series! Adds jetpacks.
body:
# Thermal Jetpacks: A Jetpack Addon for the Thermal Series!
Take your Thermal Expansion setup to new heights with Thermal Jetpacks! This addon adds craftable Fluxpacks powered by TE’s Redstone Flux (RF), giving you the freedom to fly across your world with ease.

Featuring a set of five jetpack tiers, all powered by Redstone Flux (RF). Each tier improves on speed, flight time, and durability.

Thermal Jetpacks is built with performance, balance and aesthetics in mind, we aim to blend seamlessly into thermal as much as possible.
